---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: 'Development of GROVE : A Guideline for RepOrting Vignette Experiments conducted
  in a healthcare context'
acronym: GROVE
description: |-
  Reporting experimental vignette studies.

  [GROVE Checklist (Word)](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/GROVE-Checklist.docx)
doi: ''
pmid-id: '[40107182](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40107182/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40107182/
relevant-urls: ''
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Hillen MA, Visser LNC, Labrie NHM, van Vliet LM, Saha
  S, Blanch-Hartigan D, Smets EMA; GROVE Working group. Development of GROVE: A Guideline
  for RepOrting Vignette Experiments conducted in a healthcare context. Patient Educ
  Couns. 2025;136:108750.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
- Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
# - Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
- Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
- Outcomes (variables)
- Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
- Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
# - Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- checklist
- checklists
- experiment
- experimental
- experimental studies
- experimental study
- experiments
- GROVE
- GROVE checklist
- scenario
- scenarios
- scripted scenario
- scripted scenarios
- vignette
- vignette experiment
- vignette experiments
- vignettes

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
